_meta.description: Shopware 6 Storefront variable mapping for the datrycs-ds-to-figma skill. Maps design token names to the correct Shopware SCSS variable names as defined in theme.json and _theme.scss / _bootstrap.scss. Used by Claude to generate proper _variables.scss overrides for Shopware child themes.
_meta.outputNote: TWO files are generated for Shopware projects: (1) theme-fields.json — paste into theme.json config.fields to set $sw-* vars via Shopware Administration; (2) _variables.scss — only Bootstrap overrides that are NOT in theme.json (heading sizes, font-size-base, etc.). If using _variables.scss for $sw-* vars directly (plugin context without theme.json), load it BEFORE Shopware's variables.scss and do NOT use !default — Shopware's _theme.scss already sets $sw-* with !default, so !default would make your values get ignored.

colorMapping._comment: Maps design token roles to Shopware SCSS variable names. All $sw-* vars are picked up by theme.json and are visible in the Shopware Administration theme editor.

typographyMapping._comment: Typography vars — $sw-font-family-* flow into Bootstrap's $font-family-base and $headings-font-family.

bootstrapOverrides._comment: These are pure Bootstrap 5 variables that Shopware's _bootstrap.scss sets. Override them after the $sw-* vars so they inherit correctly.

themeJsonFields._comment: These are the exact field names from theme.json — the ones that appear in the Shopware Administration. Their SCSS counterparts are listed above.

outputTemplate._comment: Use this template structure for the generated _variables.scss. Section order matters: sw-* vars must come first so Bootstrap vars can reference them.

sections.title: Shopware theme variables (sw-*)
sections.note: These values go in theme.json config.fields — NOT in _variables.scss. Shopware compiles them into $sw-* SCSS variables BEFORE _theme.scss runs. If you put them in SCSS instead, do NOT use !default (Shopware's _theme.scss already sets them with !default, so !default on your values means yours get ignored).

sections.title: Bootstrap 5 overrides
sections.note: Bootstrap vars NOT covered by theme.json (heading sizes, font-size-base, border-radius, btn padding). These go in _variables.scss WITHOUT !default — Shopware's _bootstrap.scss already sets them with !default, so omitting !default here ensures your values take precedence.

fontFaceNote: Place @font-face declarations in a separate _fonts.scss that is imported BEFORE _variables.scss in your theme's main SCSS entry point. This ensures the font-family name resolves when $sw-font-family-base references it.
themeJsonNote: To make sw-* variables editable in Shopware Administration, add them to your child theme's theme.json under config.fields with type: 'color' or 'fontFamily'. Child theme values override parent (Shopware default) values.
